{{Quote|The planet Fluwhaka. The last of the pirates has eluded me until now. The bounty is high on this one.|[[Jodo Kast]] on [[Nosstrick]]|<ref name="TEoD">''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]''</ref>}}
'''Fluwhaka''' was a misty [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] noted for its rocky spires and crags.

==Characteristics==
A [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Fluwhaka system/Legends|Fluwhaka system]] in the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Mortex sector]],<ref name="Atlas Appendix" /> Fluwhaka was a mist-covered world<ref name="CSWE" /> of blue skies,<ref name="TEoD" /> and a terrain of rocky spires and crags.<ref name="CSWE" /> Certain of these natural towers had openings and balconies in their surfaces, leading into artificial structures such as [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] strongholds.<ref name="TEoD" />

==History==
{{Quote|From Dengar to Sarlacc Food—Your "twin" spotted again, on Fluwhaka. Time to dump the garbage. You owe me two.|[[Dengar/Legends|Dengar's]] message to [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="TEoD" />}}
[[Karness Muur]] once saved his fellow [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Exiles]] from a [[trap at Fluwhaka]] during the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]].<ref name="BoS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref>

During the era of the [[New Republic]], Fluwhaka was the site of a base used by winged, [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]<ref name="CSWE" /> affiliated with the [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] pirate [[Jerresk]]. [[Jodo Kast]], in the guise of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], tracked the pirate [[Nosstrick]] to Fluwhaka, and confronted him at the entrance to his base. Kast fell for one of Nosstrick's traps, although was able to poison his quarry with [[frinka venom]]. He was left dangling over a spiked pit until [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] arrived aboard a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]], and claimed his [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] before forcing Dengar to depart the planet. In turn, Dengar contacted Boba Fett himself, informing the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] of his imposter's sighting on Fluwhaka.<ref name="TEoD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' {{1st}}
